2.1 Nov 21, 2025

Improved Plan Mode

Plan Mode

We now show clarifying questions inline for faster edits.

AI Code Review

Cursor highlights risky changes and suggests fixes.

  • Inline review comments in the editor.
  • One-click apply for safe patches.

2.0.91 Nov 10, 2025

Instant Grep (Beta)

  • Instant results for agent grep commands.
  • Regex now supported in the sidebar.
